name: frontend-slides

issues.label: Onboarding in hot path
issues.recommendation: Move onboarding copy to references/start.md and keep only detection plus routing in SKILL.md.

issues.label: Platform or delivery branch sprawl
issues.recommendation: Convert branch-heavy prose into a compact routing table plus variant references.

issues.label: Long philosophy or manifesto in hot path
issues.recommendation: Keep actionable invariants in SKILL.md and move broad rationale or teaching philosophy into references.

issues.label: Hardcoded user-facing copy
issues.recommendation: Replace long speeches with intent-level constraints unless exact wording is essential.

issues.label: Large example or command load
issues.recommendation: Keep one canonical template in SKILL.md and move long examples into references or scripts.

issues.label: Unconditional file-loading instructions
issues.recommendation: Gate supporting-file reads by phase or branch so cold-path files stay cold.

issues.label: High-cost actions on the default path
issues.recommendation: Keep expensive actions behind explicit conditions instead of default onboarding or delivery flow.

issues.label: Oversized SKILL.md
issues.recommendation: Shrink the hot path and route detail into references before the file grows further.

summary: SKILL.md is 322 lines with likely hot-path waste in: Onboarding in hot path, Platform or delivery branch sprawl, Long philosophy or manifesto in hot path.
